docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMAS, KEVIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GAMA, CAROLINA YVETTE CIVIL CODE 1590 REQUIRES GAMA TO RETURN ENGAGEMENT RING TO THOMAS. THE COURT FINDS GAMA'S TESTIMONY THAT SHE LEFT THE RING IN THOMAS' HOME TO BE CREDIBLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT GAMA, CAROLINA YVETTE RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT THOMAS, KEVIN $150.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $150.00, THOMAS MUST RETURN THE FOLLOWING ITEMS TO GAMA: 1) DRESSER 2) GOLD ROSE. THOMAS CAN ARRANGE FOR A THIRD PARTY TO DELIVER THESE ITEMS TO GAMA-OR-GAMA MAY PICK UP AT THOMAS RESIDENCE. LAW ENFORCEMENT SHALL PROVIDE A CIVIL STANDBY AT THOMAS RESIDENCE DURING PICK-UP. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,020.50 FILED BY THOMAS, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT GAMA, CAROLINA YVETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $0 SERVED MAY-18-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GAMA, CAROLINA YVETTE
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,111.00 FILED BY GAMA, CAROLINA YVETTE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT THOMAS, KEVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT GAMA, CAROLINA YVETTE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVICE FEE $100.00 SERVED JUL-03-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO PLAINTIFF THOMAS, KEVIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-11-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-11-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF KEVIN THOMAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CAROLINA YVETTE GAMA IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-11-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-11-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: CROSS-COMPLAINANT CAROLINA YVETTE GAMA IS PRESENT. CROSS-DEFENDANT KEVIN THOMAS IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT GAMA, CAROLINA YVETTE
SC-105 RQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER*** FILED BY DEFENDANT GAMA, CAROLINA YVETTE AS TO PLAINTIFF THOMAS, KEVIN
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER PLEASE SEE 2 E. OTHER ORDERS*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
